brand.whoBody1: Livo Apps develops elegant software that removes complexity from everyday business processes.
brand.whoBody2: We believe software should not overwhelm people. Software should create clarity. Software should feel light.
brand.promiseBody: Not just by automating tasks. But by reducing friction. Making complexity understandable. And creating calm in busy organizations.

product.title: PPWR Dashboard
product.subtitle: Transform packaging regulations into clear actions.
product.previewNote: Illustration — one clear status per packaging type.

features.title: Keep compliance in view
features.body: All your packaging data in one place, so you're ready when an audit comes.

features.title: Automated reporting
features.body: Generate PPWR reports without rebuilding them by hand.

features.title: Collaborate with suppliers
features.body: Share data securely. Work together. No friction.

home.trusted: Built for teams working on packaging and PPWR compliance.

finalCta.body: Book a personalized demo and see how Livo can transform your compliance process.

hero.lead: The EU Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation applies from 12 August 2026. LIVO PPWR keeps every packaging type, obligation and document in one calm place — so your team stays compliant without the stress.

whyNow.title: One regulation. A lot of new obligations.
whyNow.body: PPWR (Regulation (EU) 2025/40) applies directly across the EU and replaces the old Packaging Directive. It reaches every company that places packaging on the EU market — whatever its size.

cards.title: Prove conformity
cards.body: Each packaging type needs an EU Declaration of Conformity and technical documentation, kept on file for years.

cards.title: Meet design rules
cards.body: Recyclability, recycled content, packaging minimisation and PFAS limits all carry their own thresholds and dates.

cards.title: Avoid the fallout
cards.body: Gaps can mean fines, recalls or losing a retail listing. The work is real — the stress doesn't have to be.

what.title: Your whole packaging compliance, in one place.
what.body: Register, obligations, documents, suppliers and deadlines — connected, so nothing falls through the cracks.

features.title: Packaging register
features.body: Every packaging type you place on the market, in one list — material, weight, format and owner, found in seconds.

features.title: Obligations matrix
features.body: See at a glance which rules apply to each packaging type, and exactly where you still need to act.

features.title: Documents & Declarations of Conformity
features.body: Keep every DoC and technical file with its packaging. Upload once, and it's always where you expect it.

features.title: Suppliers
features.body: Collect the data and proof you need from suppliers, with the right owner set for you automatically.

features.title: Timeline & deadlines
features.body: PPWR phases in through 2030 and beyond. LIVO keeps the dates that matter to your packaging in view.

features.title: Compliance status
features.body: A calm, honest picture of where you stand today — and a clear next step, never a wall of red.

principles.title: The software shouldn't add to the complexity.
principles.body: PPWR is demanding enough. Every screen in LIVO PPWR follows the same principles — the ones that make work feel lighter.

items.title: Simplicity over features
items.body: One primary action per screen. Everything you need to stay compliant, nothing you don't.

items.title: Errors that help
items.body: No raw system messages. Not {code}, but “That file is a little large — try one under 15 MB.”

items.title: Calm by design
items.body: Generous whitespace and progressive disclosure keep dense pages quiet. Detail appears when you ask for it.

items.title: Smart defaults
items.body: A document is named after its file. The supplier owner is set for you. Less typing, fewer mistakes.

items.title: Validation as you go
items.body: Fields are checked while you work, so you never complete a whole form only to hit a wall at the end.

items.title: Human in the loop
items.body: You stay in control. The software suggests and prepares; you decide and confirm.

closing.title: Ready to make compliance effortless?
closing.leadBefore: See LIVO PPWR with your own packaging in a 20-minute demo — or email

footer.line1After: is part of LIVO APPS · Software that lightens the workflow.
footer.line2: This overview is not legal advice; it describes what the product does. Compliance obligations follow from the regulation itself.
